shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch next to a giant single Buy Now button with a five-step form crossed out behind it
assets.caption: Hatch next to a giant single Buy Now button with a five-step form crossed out behind it
assets.prompt: Amazon 1-Click | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing next to a giant glowing "Buy Now" button. The button is massive, simple, single. Behind Hatch, a complicated five-step checkout form is crossed out. Cream background (#faf6f0). Hatch's expression is confident. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch showing how stored credentials eliminate the checkout form
assets.caption: Hatch showing how stored credentials eliminate the checkout form
assets.prompt: Amazon 1-Click | failure-mechanism: Hatch demonstrating the mechanism: left side shows a form being filled out (address, card number). An arrow points right to a database icon labeled "STORED." Another arrow points down to a simple button labeled "1-Click." The stored data does the work the form used to do. Cream background, forest green (#4a7c59) arrows. HackProduct wordmark watermark. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch explaining the twenty-year competitive window Amazon created with the 1-Click patent
assets.caption: Hatch explaining the twenty-year competitive window Amazon created with the 1-Click patent
assets.prompt: Amazon 1-Click | lesson-frame: Hatch in coaching pose. Behind it: a timeline from 1997 to 2017 showing a patent period shading. On the right side of the timeline, competitor figures are frozen. On the left (Amazon), a growth arrow continues upward. The visual metaphor is competitive advantage through constraint. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
